title: Mythos was the critical trigger for IBM's open-source cybersecurity push, Krishna says
summary: IBM has signed Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan and Bank of America onto its open-source cybersecurity effort called Project Lightwell.

title: Bernstein Sets Long-Term Oil Price Target At $75 Per Barrel
summary: Wall Street analyst Bernstein Research has established $75 per barrel as a reasonable long-term oil price target for equity valuations, pointing to rising marginal costs and declining reserves. title: Chevron Files to Take 70% Stake in Greek Offshore Block
summary: Chevron has filed a request to buy 70% in an oil and gas exploration block offshore southwest Greece in what would be another step in the U.S. supermajor’s expansion in the Eastern Mediterranean. title: Suriname Wants Two Wins From One Block: Gas Is Done, Oil Could Follow
summary: Suriname’s offshore Block 52, which has already yielded a major gas discovery, could be declared commercial for oil within the next year and a half, Annand Jagesar, managing director of Suriname’s state oil firm Staatsolie, has told Reuters. title: Malaysia Boosts Domestic Gas Use as Power Demand Hits Record Highs
summary: A major heatwave and soaring data center electricity consumption are driving Malaysia’s power demand to record highs, pushing the world’s fifth-largest LNG exporter to increase domestic gas use for power generation. title: Manifold hits out at ‘lies’ over his conduct
summary: Albert Manifold says he ‘pushed hard’ at FTSE oil group but disputes criticism of his behaviour

title: Exxon fracks its blue state exit
summary: The oil major’s investors overwhelmingly voted in favour of its proposal to move its corporate domicile to Texas

title: ExxonMobil wins decisive backing to move corporate domicile to Texas
